---
title: "PDAV"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{PDAV}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	collapse = TRUE,
	comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(PDAV)
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(simsam)
```


```{r}
study_area <- st_read("~/git/FeatureVSGeo/simulation2_AGB/data/study_area.gpkg")
study_area_west <- st_read("~/git/FeatureVSGeo/simulation2_AGB/data/study_area_west.gpkg")
study_area_east <- st_read("~/git/FeatureVSGeo/simulation2_AGB/data/study_area_east.gpkg")

r <- rast(dir("~/git/FeatureVSGeo/simulation2_AGB/data/raster_data/", pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE))

response_name <- "ABG1" # column in the sample points containing the target
```



```{r}
set.seed(123)
sample_random <- sam_field(
	x = r,
	size = 100,
	type = "random",
	na.rm = TRUE
) |>
	terra::extract(x = r, bind = TRUE) |>
	st_as_sf()


# Clustered sampling
set.seed(456)
sample_clustered <- sam_field(
	x = r,
	size = 100,
	type = "clustered",
	type_opts = list(nclusters = 5, radius = 60000),
	na.rm = TRUE
) |>
	terra::extract(x = r, bind = TRUE) |>
	st_as_sf()


```


```{r}
result_random <- da_cv(
	samples = sample_random,
	predictors = r,
	response = response_name,
	folds_k = 5,
	autoc_threshold = 350,
	cate_num = 0
)

# Using clustered samples
result_clustered <- da_cv(
	samples = sample_clustered,
	predictors = r,
	response = response_name,
	folds_k = 5,
	autoc_threshold = 350,
	cate_num = 0
)

plot(result_random)
plot(result_clustered)

```
